arts.ttl: West Ham chiefs not happy with one of Julen Lopetegui’s summer signings
arts.sum: West Ham United’s board have been left disappointed by one of Julen Lopetegui’s summer signings. The Hammers signed Luis Guilherme from Palmeiras in the summer for a reported £25 million fee. arts.ttl: West Ham vs Ipswich: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Two sides struggling for wins at the start of the new season lock horns on Saturday afternoon as West Ham United host Ipswich Town in the Premier League. West Ham predicted lineup vs Ipswich (4-2-3-1) : Areola; Wan-Bissaka, Todibo, Kilman, Emerson; Soucek, Rodriguez; Bowen, Paqueta, Kudus; Antonio.
